name: Pumpkin Soup with Honey and Cloves
recipeIngredient: 2 Tablespoons I Can't Believe It's Not Butter - Light (1/4 Stick)
6 Cups Nonfat Vegetable Broth (Low Sodium) or More
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Add carrots, celery, and onion; sauté until tender, about 8 minutes.
3. Add pumpkin, broth, and cloves. Cover and simmer until pumpkin is very tender, about 25 minutes.
4. Discard cloves. Puree soup in batches in a blender.
5. Return to Dutch oven. Stir in cream and honey. Bring to a simmer.
6. Season to taste with salt and pepper. (Can be made up to 1 day ahead. Chill. Bring to a simmer before serving, thinning with more broth if desired.)
7. Makes 8 servings
Origin: Le Bec-Fin; Philadelphia, PA
